question.text: Basis in commodity derivatives is defined as:

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Basis = Spot Price - Futures Price. Negative basis means contango (futures > spot). Positive basis means backwardation (spot > futures). **The Trap:** Futures - Spot gives the opposite sign. Strike - Spot is moneyness. Premium - IV is time value. **Cross-Exam Context:** Series VIII covers basis risk in equity hedging. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Track basis daily for hedged positions — changes in basis directly impact hedge effectiveness. Convergence to zero at expiry is the natural expected behavior.
